title: Adaptation of dark mode
excerpt:
Hi, 
I am using the dark mode and it appears that on many instances, the text color does not adapt to the dark background and is thus not readable. Any chance to change that soon? 
Thanks. 
Philipp

posts.author: Philipp_Nies (Philipp Nies)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am using the dark mode and it appears that on many instances, the text color does not adapt to the dark background and is thus not readable. Any chance to change that soon?

Thanks.

posts.author: AndrewJVR (Andrew Jansen Van Rensburg)
posts.cookedHtml: In agreement with this - Pivot table is almost unreadable in dark mode

posts.author: doransheftall (Doran)
posts.cookedHtml: This seems to affect a number of widgets, specifically the Pivot widget, but only when you hide controls.

posts.author: alex.walton (Alex Walton)
posts.cookedHtml:
This also affects the online docs view.

posts.cookedHtml: It also has in impact on the signature column.
